summary: The latest technology news from the past 6 hours reveals a strong focus on AI advancements in 2026, including major model updates (GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6), the mainstream adoption of Model Context Protocol, and the shift of AI agents from demos to production environments. Key trends include autonomous AI systems, quantum computing breakthroughs, and the pervasive integration of AI across all industry sectors.
